data.description: A background gives your character background, feature, and a general skills, proficiency in two (a and might give you additionallanguages or certain of Record kinds tools. this with information, with personality information you along the develop, your on character sheet.

You determine character's background, and starting equipment, armor, weapons, and other gear. This section includes information on equipment your character has, which is detailed in the adventuring record sheet. Instead of taking all the given equipment of a background, you can purchase some pieces of equipment based on your gold (gp) amount, as shown in Chapter 5. If you wish, you can also have a trinket at no cost, as listed in the table of Chapter 5. Your Strength score limits the amount of gear you can carry, and you should try not to purchase equipment that exceeds your Strength times 15 pounds (in Chapter 7).
